notableEvents.label: Mauricio Dubón GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mauricio Dubón grounds into a double play, third baseman Max Muncy to second baseman Alex Freeland to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Jorge Mateo out at 2nd. Mauricio Dubón out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Dominic Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Smith singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Andy Pages. Mike Yastrzemski to 3rd.
